verses.commentary: As for other matters signals transition. How to live in order to please God frames ethics theologically. As in fact you are living acknowledges present obedience before urging more, encouraging rather than condemning.

You know what instructions recalls teaching already given. By the authority of the Lord Jesus establishes divine, not merely human, origin for ethical commands. Apostolic instruction carries Christ's authority.

God's will that you should be sanctified makes holiness not optional. Avoid sexual immorality specifies sanctification's negative dimension in pagan Thessalonica, where temple prostitution and loose sexual ethics were normal.

Learn to control your own body in a way that is holy and honorable requires discipline. Body control demonstrates sanctification's embodied nature. Holiness is not abstract spirituality but concrete physical purity.

Not in passionate lust like the pagans distinguishes Christian from surrounding culture. Who do not know God explains pagan behavior: ignorance of God produces moral chaos. Knowledge of God transforms desire.

In this matter no one should wrong or take advantage connects sexual sin to justice. Brother or sister emphasizes harm within community. The Lord will punish shows God's active judgment, not passive disapproval. Warning given before establishes prior notification.
God did not call us to be impure but to live a holy life frames calling positively and negatively. Divine initiative establishes both destination and motivation for sanctification.

Anyone who rejects this instruction does not reject a human being but God elevates sexual ethics to divine command. The very God who gives you his Holy Spirit links holiness to the Spirit's indwelling presence. Sin against the body sins against the Spirit's temple.

About your love for one another we do not need to write acknowledges existing practice. You yourselves have been taught by God shifts agency to divine instructor. God's internal teaching produces brotherly love naturally.

In fact, you do love all of God's family throughout Macedonia commends widespread affection. Yet we urge you to do so more and more shows that maturity is increase, not arrival. Growth has no ceiling.

Make it your ambition to lead a quiet life inverts worldly ambition. Mind your own business and work with your hands contradicts both idle busybodies and aristocratic disdain for manual labor. Christian community requires productive members.

That your daily life may win the respect of outsiders connects ethics to witness. Not be dependent on anybody preserves dignity and removes reproach. Self-sufficiency supports gospel credibility among unbelievers.

We do not want you to be uninformed addresses their specific question. About those who sleep in death uses euphemism for believers' death. So that you do not grieve like the rest who have no hope distinguishes Christian grief: sorrow mixed with hope, not despair.

We believe that Jesus died and rose again establishes resurrection as foundation. And so we believe God will bring with Jesus those who have fallen asleep draws inference: Christ's resurrection guarantees believers' resurrection. In him links their destiny to his.

According to the Lord's word appeals to dominical teaching, possibly oral tradition not recorded in Gospels. We who are still alive, who are left until the coming assumes Paul might survive. Will certainly not precede comforts: the living gain no advantage.

The Lord himself will come down personalizes the return. Loud command, voice of the archangel, trumpet call of God create dramatic scene of authority and announcement. The dead in Christ will rise first gives priority to those who died before the parousia.

After that sequences events. We who are still alive and are left will be caught up together with them emphasizes unity. In the clouds recalls Daniel 7 and Christ's ascension. To meet the Lord in the air pictures royal welcome. And so we will be with the Lord forever states the goal: permanent presence.
Therefore encourage one another with these words turns eschatology into pastoral care. Theology serves comfort. The doctrine's purpose is mutual strengthening, not speculative satisfaction.
